description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the dockcross/windows-x86 Docker image and defines a single build stage. Add a build job named build that runs in the build stage, executes the commands $CC --version, ./createallprojects, and make -f everything.mak mathlib tier1 vgui_controls, and stores the directory lib/public/linux32 as an artifact. No services, caches, or special rules are needed.
